title: import_chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 — manifest contract for per-chrom × per-dyad CO/DCO/NCO TSV captures
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_chromosome_meiosis_events'. Reads a per-(chromosome × dyad) event-count TSV (typically produced by an aggregation script over ngsTracts tract_classifications.tsv + ngsPedigree Stage 3's dyad_event_rates.tsv) and emits a staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 layer. Per the SPEC, expected canonical columns are parent_id, offspring_id, chrom, chrom_len_bp, n_co, n_dco, n_nco, co_per_mb, dco_per_mb, mean_co_position_bp, median_co_position_bp, karyotype_at_focal_inv (optional).

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the per-(chrom × dyad) TSV.

max_rows.description: Optional cap for very large fixtures.
